matcher_value: $e=Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System';StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-30);Level=@(1,2,3)} -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.ProviderName -eq 'Microsoft-Windows-WHEA-Logger' -or $_.Message -match '(?i)\becc\b|memory error|single-bit|multi-bit|uncorrectable' }; if($e){@($e | Select-Object TimeCreated,ProviderName,Id,LevelDisplayName,@{N='Message';E={($_.Message -replace '\r?\n',' ')}}) | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4}else{'No ECC/memory-error-like events found in the last 30 days.'}
